explanations.16: useBlogPost() is a hook that gives you information about the current blog post context, including whether you're viewing a single post page or a list of posts.
explanations.17: This returns a CSS class name for spacing only when viewing the blog list; it returns undefined (no class) when viewing an individual post page.
explanations.24: We're calling that same hook again here to get the metadata (like title, date, author) and the isBlogPostPage flag so we can decide what to render.
explanations.34: The && operator here means 'only render the Bluesky component if isBlogPostPage is true', so it only shows up on individual post pages, not on the blog list view.
